rationale.R1.5: The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but some minor reorganization is needed to improve clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but could provide more explicit confidence markings.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and mostly within scope with no drifts.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in some minor regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, but could provide more explicit provenance for minor edits.
